channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 15 Science-Backed Reasons to Drink Coffee and Tea
item.description: Your daily cup offers more than a caffeine boost. Discover how coffee and tea may benefit your heart, brain, liver, and more.

item.title: Home transvaginal ultrasound is preferred to in-clinic ultrasound and is associated with similar accuracy
item.description: At-home transvaginal ultrasound is clinically accurate compared to in-clinic procedures, preferred by patients, and not linked to...

item.title: The Scan by 2 Minute Medicine: popular joint supplement raises Alzheimer's red flags, the gut health industry is outrunning the science, chronic wasting disease is spreading silently and scientists are watching closely, and the oral GLP-1 pill era begins with Foundayo
item.description: The Scan by 2 Minute Medicine is a pop-culture medical newsletter for subscribers. That joint supplement...
